name: wire_connector_forge
description: Wire Connector Forge (from research: workdir/connector_forge and artifacts) to mcp add and TASK system. So missing connectors (e.g. more domain/godaddy variants) can be forged and auto-registered as Podman MCPs via /task or manager.

steps.action: create TASK or script that runs forge for a service then mcp add --podman
test end-to-end with a sample (e.g. new vercel helper)
